title: Change-log storage quota now enforced on managed and self-hosted hubs
summary: The append-only change log is metered against the same per-user storage quota as backups and file uploads. Previously this gate ran only on demo hubs, so a hub's change log could grow past its plan quota without being rejected.
highlights: Appends over quota are rejected with QUOTA_EXCEEDED, matching how backups and uploads already behave
Demo hubs are unaffected: they continue to meter against the demo override
